title: Add five new selectable passes to homepage Tickets & Passes section

requirements.summary: Extend the homepage Tickets & Passes list to include five additional pass options with exact names and price/inclusion labels plus appropriate descriptions, while keeping existing passes.
acceptanceCriteria: On the homepage, the Tickets & Passes card lists the five new passes in addition to the existing passes.
Each of the five new passes displays: (a) pass name, (b) price or inclusion label exactly as provided, and (c) the provided/generated description text.
Skip the Line Pass shows $34 and Kid Pass shows $8.
Touch Pass displays that it is included with Regular Pass and requires asking to upgrade.
Blackout Pass displays that it is included with ticket and includes a clear darkness-related warning.

file_operations.description: Create a typed, centralized list of pass option content used by the homepage Tickets & Passes section. Ensure the five new passes are included with the exact names and price/inclusion labels: Content Creator Pass ($4), Touch Pass (Included with Regular Pass; ask to upgrade), Skip the Line Pass ($34), Blackout Pass (Included with ticket), Kid Pass ($8). Keep existing pass options (Bloody Pass, U Think U Brave Pass, Regular Pass, Horn Pass) in the list. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Update the Tickets & Passes portion of the section to render pass options from the centralized pass list, ensuring the five new passes appear alongside the existing passes and display name + price/inclusion label + description text exactly as required. Keep the section layout consistent with existing shadcn/ui-composed Card/Separator styling and do not modify any files under frontend/src/components/ui. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

requirements.summary: Make homepage pass options selectable (single-select) with an accessible, obvious selection state and a UI-only 'Secure your pass' CTA with confirmation feedback.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can select exactly one pass option in the Tickets & Passes section (e.g., radio-group style selection).
A "Secure your pass" call-to-action is present and is disabled until a pass is selected.
Triggering the CTA provides immediate UI feedback that includes the selected pass name (e.g., a toast/alert/inline confirmation).
No payment processing, checkout flow, or third-party integrations are added.

file_operations.description: Create a PassSelector component that renders the provided pass options as a keyboard-navigable, single-select control (native radio inputs or equivalent), with clear selected styling and accessible labeling. Include a UI-only "Secure your pass" CTA that is disabled until a selection is made, and on activation shows immediate confirmation feedback containing the selected pass name (inline message within the section). Use existing shadcn/ui building blocks by composition only (e.g., Card/Alert/Separator patterns already used in the app) without editing frontend/src/components/ui. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Wire PassSelector into the Tickets & Passes card: pass in the full pass list, ensure exactly one selection is possible, and place the "Secure your pass" CTA and confirmation feedback within this section (homepage). Ensure the CTA stays UI-only (no payments, no backend calls) and selection is visually obvious and keyboard accessible. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
